calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant,Aaron Kyle Robinson, no appearance; respondent, Vance Ingalls, appears as pro per. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.
Judge informed the respondent that appellant did not appear therefore, the judgment will be in his favor and the small claims judgment stands.
10:05am
Case is adjourn. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Judgment Entered
